name: HWM_RP_TM_PRD_RESOLVED_V
query: SELECT res.RESOLVED_TM_PERIOD_ID, res.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, res.REPEATING_TM_PERIOD_ID, res.START_DATE START_DATE_TIME , res.END_DATE END_DATE_TIME , trunc(res.START_DATE) Start_Date_TRUNC , trunc(res.END_DATE) End_Date_TRUNC , pd.NAME PERIOD_name , pd.PERIOD_CLASS, pd.PERIOD_TYPE, pd.PERIOD_START_DATE, pd.MULTIPLE, pd.MONTH_TYPE, pd.ONE_OR_MANY, pd.PERIOD_LENGTH, pd.REFERENCE_DATE, pd.RULE_USAGE, pd.TIME_ENTRY_USAGE, pd.APPROVAL_USAGE, pd.MODULE_ID, pd.ENTERPRISE_ID, pd.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, pd.LAST_UPDATED_BY, pd.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, pd.CREATED_BY, pd.CREATION_DATE, pd.WEEK_TYPE, pd.PERIOD_CD, pd.ACCRUAL_USAGE, pd.BALANCE_USAGE, pd.OVERTIME_USAGE FROM HWM_RP_TM_RESOLVED res , HWM_RP_TM_periods_vl pd where res.repeating_tm_period_id = pd.repeating_tm_period_id
